Careers/Product Builder

Product Builder

LocationBangalore or Seattle
Employment typeFull-time
Location typeIn-person
DepartmentProduct
Apply
LocationBangalore or Seattle
Employment typeFull-time
Location typeIn-person
DepartmentProduct
Apply

"Men wanted for hazardous journey. Small wages, bitter cold, long months of complete darkness, constant danger. Safe return doubtful. Honour and recognition in event of success." — Ernest Shackleton

Commenda is the global business engine — one platform to incorporate, file taxes, and stay compliant across 70+ countries. The problems are real and messy: foreign tax authorities, filing deadlines, customers stuck at 11pm. We build software to solve them.

This is not a write-PRDs-and-hand-them-off job. You sit in the customer's seat, find what's actually broken, and ship the fix — using Claude and whatever other AI tools get you there fastest. You'll work directly with engineers and coordinate with the GMs who own each product. We'll train you on tax and compliance.

What you'll do

  • Go deep on customer and ops problems until you understand them better than anyone here.
  • Build. Use Claude and AI tools to ship scripts, internal tools, prototypes, and features — not slide decks.
  • Work side by side with engineers and coordinate with product GMs to get things shipped.
  • Find and bring in new tools and models before anyone asks.
  • Own the outcome, not the task.

Who you are

  • High agency. You move on problems without being told.
  • You build with AI. You already use Claude or similar to make real things, fast.
  • You can code, or taught yourself enough to ship and will get good quickly.
  • Hands dirty. Messy ops, ugly data, hard customers — none of it is beneath you.

About the team

We're a high-agency, high-intensity team that works like a sports team — we train hard, push each other, and win together.

We're not looking for someone who wants a safe corporate internship. We want someone who's imaginative, unafraid, and willing to try unhinged ideas.

This is not a 9–5. It's fast, chaotic, fun, and you'll learn more in 3 months than any marketing course can teach you.

New grads welcome. This role is in person in Bangalore or Seattle.
